structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Group Commissioning Override Switches Provision
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide a set of testing/commissioning software switches that override all zones served by the Zone Group, one switch for each zone-level override switch listed in terminal unit sequences.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify that a separate software switch is provided for each of the zone-level override switches listed under Testing and Commissioning Overrides in terminal unit sequences.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: For each Zone Group , provide a set of testing/commissioning software switches that override all zones served by the Zone Group . Provide a separate software switch for each of the zone -level override switches listed under “Testing and Commissioning Overrides” in terminal  unit sequences.
